ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "publisher_address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  "publisher_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the publisher */,
  "publisher_email" TEXT /* Email address of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "journal_issuer" TEXT /* Publisher of the journal */,
  "journal_ISSN" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number (ISSN) */,
  "journal_eISSN" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number (eISSN) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the article */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the journal where the article is published */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the published article */,
  "article_Abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the article */,
  "article_author" TEXT /* Author of the article */,
  "article_date" TEXT /* Date of the article publication */,
  "article_category" TEXT /* Category of the article */,
  "article_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_details" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost record */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article associated with the cost */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Amount of cost for the article */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Currency reference for the cost */,
  "cost_type" TEXT /* Type of cost (e.g., publication fee, APC) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_details_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_details_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article associated with the status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the article (e.g., submitted, published) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_status_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the article */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_access_logs_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article associated with the keyword */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword for the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_keywords_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article associated with the author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "author_affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_authors_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article associated with the forecast */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast (e.g., cost, citation) */,
  "forecast_value" TEXT /* Value of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_forecasts_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_impact_factors" (
  "impact_factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact factor */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article associated with the impact factor */,
  "impact_factor_date" TEXT /* Date of the impact factor */,
  "impact_factor_value" TEXT /* Value of the impact factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_impact_factors_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)
